calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-463 channel-agnosticism: exogenous-urgency variance decomposition at a SECOND incumbent identity (residue_weighted primary, f secondary)
items.note: Closes the channel-agnosticism half that V3-EXQ-785a explicitly left UNTESTED. 785a refuted MECH-463 concentration at ONE incumbent identity (harm_weighted; var_total fold 0.970, share gap +0.0036 under 1 SE), so MECH-463 was left at candidate rather than demoted. Two regimes from the scoping spike (REE_assembly/evidence/planning/mech463_channel_agnosticism_scoping_spike_2026-07-19.md): PRIMARY residue_incumbent (rho_residue=20.0, harm channel ON -- a reweighting, not an ablation; incumbent share .585/.887/.868 across seeds 0/1/2 with harm surviving as a genuine second component), SECONDARY f_incumbent (lambda_ethical=0.05). The entropy axis stays EXCLUDED (CH:mech341 absorbs ~99-115% at every setting -- arithmetically forced), and D1/D2 gain + softmax temperature were ruled out structurally in code: both act downstream of the per-candidate component vectors so neither can change incumbent identity. novelty_weighted is DEAD BY CONSTRUCTION (e3_selector.py:963-971), so licensed breadth is TWO cost-side primary components, not the full channel set. FIXES one 785a defect: whole-run gate AND-aggregation (all(gate_green)) replaced with _lib/precondition_gate.aggregate_arm_gates any-arm-green -- at two regimes the old form is exactly the V3-EXQ-785 autopsy defect where one red arm vacates a green arm; Does NOT supersede 785a -- its harm_weighted result is this run comparison arm. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is incumbent share under exogenous urgency at a NON-harm incumbent; checked 785 and 785a (the only runs carrying urgency_applied at all), both run rho_residue at its 0.5 default, so not recoverable by reanalysis. Smoke PASS: both regimes produce their pre-registered incumbent, fidelity err 2.8e-17.

items.title: MECH-463 hazard-geometry: exogenous hazard proximity, within-seed design (ledger leg H-endogenous-hazard-geometry)
items.note: TARGET: hypothesis-space ledger leg `arousal-variance-amplifier`::`H-endogenous-hazard-geometry` (hypothesis_space_registry.v1.json), the ONE leg left alive after V3-EXQ-785a eliminated the two arousal hypotheses. Adjudication: failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-785_2026-07-19.md s9a. NEW NUMBER not a letter: 785/785a asked whether AROUSAL amplifies/concentrates selection variance; this asks whether HAZARD PROXIMITY drives committed-selection candidate geometry -- the mechanism under test changed. DOES BOTH FIXES THE LEDGER NAMED, not one: (a) hazard proximity is MANIPULATED (single hazard re-pinned to a pre-registered Manhattan distance from the agent every env step, bearing re-drawn each time, num_hazards=1 so the hazard_field_view normaliser is fixed, env_drift_prob=0 so the manipulation cannot decay) rather than observed; (b) 24 seeds instead of 5, so within- and between-seed variation separate. LOAD-BEARING STATISTIC is the mean of per-seed WITHIN-SEED OLS slopes, one-sample t-test across seeds against a pre-registered critical value plus an SD-of-effect and absolute floor. The POOLED tick-level correlation is recorded as an explicitly-labelled DECOY and routes NOTHING -- it is the statistic that made hazard look confirmed in 785a (pooled r -0.187/+0.171, but per-seed [+0.089,+0.076,+0.041,-0.125,+0.135]: Simpson's paradox on n=5). D2/D3/D4 expose the between-seed channel and test whether 785a's seed-0 anomaly (mean share 0.833 ~ 785's endpoint 0.831) replicates. COVARIATE is hazard_prox_center (index 12 of the learner's own 5x5 hazard_field_view), NOT hazard_prox_max as 785a used -- max SATURATES at 1.0 for every d<=2 since the window spans +/-2. No privileged global oracle distance (the 732a confound). NULL-vs-INEXPRESSIVE PRE-DECLARED: arm A3 sweeps support_preserving_ao_std_floor as a positive control on the same statistic C1 routes on. A3 green -> a flat hazard response is a GENUINE null and the leg is eliminated; A3 flat -> `measurement_channel_inexpressive`, non_contributory, leg stays alive, nothing concluded. Dry run measured A3 per-seed log10 var spans 1.00 and 1.58 against a 0.10 floor, so the control has teeth. Second tell: A2 (urgency free) checks H's own premise that near-hazard ticks are high-urgency ticks. SCOPE: SD-011 commit-threshold route only; use_harm_variance_commit OFF so the gated quantity is the z_world RUNNING VARIANCE (world-model stability), not candidate separation. CHANNEL-AGNOSTICISM IS OUT OF SCOPE (single harm_weighted incumbent; entropy regime dropped with recorded evidence that CH:mech341 absorbs 99-115% of cross-candidate variance) -- a concurrent session is writing v3_exq_785b_mech463_channel_agnosticism_decomp.py for that half. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is the within-seed slope on EXOGENOUSLY ASSIGNED proximity. Checked 785/785a per_tick_rows -- they carry only OBSERVED proximity, which is precisely the confound, so the readout is not recoverable and the run is required. RECORDING: per-tick rows embedded IN the manifest (custom_information.per_tick_rows); a cloud sidecar is never transported under Phase 3 and that is how 785 lost its sink. last_score_diagnostics cleared before every select_action (785's ~9.0x pseudo-replication); the skip driver is the E3 CADENCE (agent.py:5429), NOT the commitment latch as 785a's note states -- corrected in the docstring. RUNTIME: ~150 min on a cloud worker (linux-x86_64). The Mac is ~7x slower (dry run measured 0.427 s/tick vs 785's cloud 0.057), so a Mac claim would take ~14h -- prefer cloud. episodes_per_run 2000 is the A1/A2 denominator; A3 cells print /1000 (an already-decisive control given a smaller budget), so the initial ETA is conservative for those 24 cells. SMOKE: PASS. Manipulation verified -- realized hazard_prox_center by level {0.222,0.286,0.400,0.500,0.667} matching pre-registration to 6dp, fidelity corr 0.991/0.989 vs a 0.90 floor. NOTE FOR ADJUDICATION: dry run measured z_world participation ratio ~5.0, materially above the ~1.06 in the 785a caveat; if that reproduces, the under-differentiation objection is weaker than assumed. Reported as a flag, not a correction (may be different populations). ON COMPLETION resolve the leg via /failure-autopsy Step 9b -- the registry's SINGLE producer. Do NOT hand-edit hypothesis_space_registry.v1.json.
